name: VIDT
changelog: 🎨 NEW: Professional FontAwesome icons throughout the app (replaced all emojis)
📐 NEW: Compact left sidebar design for more workspace
🎨 NEW: Redesigned Shape Tools dialog with modern styling
🎨 NEW: Redesigned Layer Order dialog with professional appearance
📍 NEW: Fixed floating toolbar position (stays at top-right)
🔧 FIXED: Crop feature now works correctly with all overlay elements
🔧 FIXED: Layer ordering works properly with cropped videos
🔧 FIXED: Profile download limit increased to 5000 videos
🔧 FIXED: Eliminated white window flash on startup
🔧 FIXED: App now exits cleanly and returns to terminal
⚡ IMPROVED: Faster startup with optimized window initialization
⚡ IMPROVED: Better memory management during profile extraction
